summary: The diff implements a selectable pass list on the homepage Tickets & Passes section via a new PassSelector component and centralized passOptions data, including the five requested new passes with the specified prices/inclusion labels and appropriate descriptions. One potential mismatch is the CTA label casing compared to the acceptance criteria wording.

missing_requirements.requirement: A "Secure your pass" call-to-action is present (as stated in the AC).
missing_requirements.reason: The implemented button text is "Secure Your Pass" (different casing) rather than exactly "Secure your pass" as written in the acceptance criteria. If exact text matching is required, this is not met.
